svg.title: Network intrusion detection MLOps architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end system: data pipeline feeding model training, a model registry with human-approved promotion, a FastAPI serving layer behind Docker and Kubernetes, and a monitoring layer with drift detection, alerting and explainability.

g.text: Versioned models, served via a "production" alias
Drift or attack-rate alert feeds back into the retrain loop above
